description: Example of the deduplication system detecting a duplicate incident
scenario: Second report of the same Redis/Basket checkout failure

original_incident.title: Checkout failure — orders not processing after Redis restart

duplicate_report.title: Unable to checkout — cart keeps failing
duplicate_report.description: Since about 2:20 PM, when I try to checkout, the cart shows an error. It seems like the basket is broken.

triage_result.reasoning: This incident describes identical symptoms (checkout failure, basket errors) in the same time window as SRE-1001. The root cause (Redis connection failure in Basket.API) matches exactly. Marking as duplicate to avoid noise.

action: Incident marked as DUPLICATE. No new ticket created. Original ticket SRE-1001 referenced.
benefit: Deduplication prevented 1 redundant ticket creation and 2 redundant notifications.
